nodes.logic_delta: Changed algorithm from HS256 to RS256.

nodes.impact: Now requires public_key path in environment variables.

policy_constraints: Security Standard v4: All RSA keys must be 4096-bit.

active_problem_set.problem: Loader expects HMAC secret; new logic expects RSA Public Key.
active_problem_set.remediation_hint: Update ConfigLoader to support .pem file loading.
